name: parts_availability
description: Check if a specific part is available for a customer's vehicle repair. Call this when the customer asks if you can do a same-day or urgent repair and a specific part is involved. Speak the result naturally: 'We should be able to get that part in today' or 'That part would need to be ordered — we could have it done by Thursday.'

part_description.description: Description of the part needed, e.g. 'front brake pads', 'radiator hose', 'alternator', 'starter motor', 'timing belt kit'. Use the customer's words.

vehicle_make.description: Vehicle make, e.g. Toyota, Ford, Holden, Hyundai

vehicle_model.description: Vehicle model, e.g. Camry, Ranger, Commodore, i30

vehicle_year.description: Vehicle year as a 4-digit string, e.g. 2018
